name: mitto-ai-presentation
description: Claude Code in Practice — presentation app and live demo target

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace apps/web run test && npm --workspace server run test
scripts.coverage: npm --workspace apps/web run coverage && npm --workspace server run coverage
